title: Tesla’s cash burn will test investor faith in its AI bets
summary: The company has just posted its best delivery quarter on record, yet Wall Street expects it to burn through roughly $3.25bn in free cash flow, a gap that measures the distance between Elon Musk’s autonomy promises and the cost of funding them.
caption: output/2026-07-21/tesla-s-cash-burn-will-test-investor-faith-in-its-ai-bets.txt
